SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-05-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-31-2006 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE TO 7/31/06 AT 5:30 P.M. SETTLEMENT PENDING WITH DEFT. TOSHIBA. DISMISS DEFT TRAVIS CAIN DBA NEW DIMENSION WITH PREJUDICE PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. DMWP IF N/APPEAR 7/31/06.
